assertions.assertion: Client uses GrantTypes.ClientCredentials as the allowed grant type

assertions.rationale: Lines 22-25 define both ApiScope("invoices.read") and ApiScope("invoices.pay") in AddInMemoryApiScopes.

assertions.assertion: Secret is loaded from Configuration or an external source — not a hardcoded string with Sha256()
assertions.rationale: Line 36 loads the secret via builder.Configuration["Clients:BillingService:Secret"].Sha256(), reading from IConfiguration. The response also explains storing secrets in a vault for production.
